# comfyui_minimax_subject_to_video_node (Resource)

Generates videos synchronously based on an image and prompt, and optional parameters. [api node/video/MiniMax]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model` (String) Input: COMBO default: S2V-01
- `prompt_text` (String) Input: STRING default:
- `subject` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)

### Optional

- `seed` (Number) Input: INT default: 0

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `video_output` (String) Output: VIDEO (slot 0)
